title: senecio littoreus
intro: Senecio littoreus, also known as coastal ragwort, is a flowering plant species native to the coastal regions of Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Senecio littoreus include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and provide relief from skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Senecio littoreus is often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves that can be applied topically to the skin or consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
